# API

## R

Example

check Blair's [talk](https://github.com/blairj09-talks/plumber-webinar-2020)

https://www.rplumber.io/
https://community.rstudio.com/tag/plumber
https://github.com/rstudio/webinars
https://github.com/meztez/rapidoc
https://github.com/meztez/plumberDeploy
https://github.com/rstudio/plumber
https://github.com/sol-eng/plumberExamples
